COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Honors theses from the classes of 1970-2012 include compilers Jon White, Tamara Lynn Clark, Stephen Rulyak, Tara White, Cheryl L. Meehan, Kristine Marchalonis, Courtney Abrams, Mai Longden, Atish Shah, Cara Harth, Neil Shouba, Brett Oberst, Anika Trancik, Jennefer Allyn Russo, Robert Cohen, Gregory Bassuk, Jennifer Gorrelick, Amy Carpenter, Beth Ann Clauss, Tammy Freeberg, Jeannine Morrone, Margaret Kyle, Leslie Moskowitz, Carrie Ortiz, Robyn Altman, Michael Buff, Gaby Maimon, David Jackrel, David Rodin, Mary Beth Turell, Deirdre Cohen, Michael Siegel, Tina Shiau, Elizabeth Bowdish, Aaron David Tax, Amy Schreier, Hoi-Yan Erica Chan, Claire Ryan, Susan Metosky, Albert Ting, Matthew Semino, Rebecca Pinchoff, Sandra Irlen, Elyse Kantrowitz, Arjun Joshi, Jennifer Amengual, Nathaniel J. Dorfman, Rema Hanna, Sara E. Best, May L. Tan, Leslie Alkalay, Alison Moed, Julie Pranikoff, Ilene West, Matthew Mandel, Roberta Lynn Paikoff, Adrienne Bello, Patrick Collins, Joan E. Manhardt, Marc Rachman, Bruce Stephen Stuart, Stephen Wright, Katharina Boser, Lauren Kidder McGarry, Wendy Schuman, Maj-Stina Lunstrum, Mariano Macqueda, David Tate, Sarah Seidman, Seth Axelrod, Bonnie McIntosh, Amy Sussman, Ann Marie White, Nicole Allen, Michael Brezsnyak, Natalie Sikka, Allison Halpern, Kerri Aaron, Arielle S. Berman, Karin Price, Denisse Jovel Van Vonderen, David Biek, David A. Sbarra, Sudwiti Chanda, Sharon Flicker, Nancy Raitano, Nisha Antony, Courtney Rennicke, Caitlin Dunning, Meghan Gillan, Todd Jusko, Annie Roth, Donna Santoro, Jennifer Zanko, Meghan Butryn, Sarah Ka-Wah Yeung, Heather Lord, Courtney Berry, Krista Beiswenger, Jessica Benas, Jessica Conser, Varrie Davies, David Lee, Erica Levin, Erica Liberman, Thomas Olino, Annie Rosenburg, Vaeraanong Stakhao, Suzanne Saufer, Elena Ershova, Llana Kramer, Sarah Bufferd, Katy Devine, Randi Dublin, Michelle Finnegan, Allison Friedman, Yoko Iwaki, Tara Kakaty, Caryn Kerman, Robert Latzman, Jospeh Marasia, Sara Rosenblum, Dana Shanis, Kiran Sunkavalli, Harris Tescher, Corissa Lynn Callahan, Kathryn Howell, Jason Kwartner, Victoria Liang, Stacey Jennifer Lipitz, Noah M. Meyers, Kimberly Ann Notheis, Jessica Richards, Lindsay B. Slater, Maryann Totino, Rachel Theresa Ziwich, Nicole S. Simon, Hanna Muenke, Jennifer L. Rosenblum, Mark Celano, Judith Katz, Elizabeth Riccardi, Brittany Cohen, Abbie Dinowitz, Margaret Gichane, Keren Lerner, Martha Dee Kayser, Matthew Robert Nulty and Allison Nicole Lipitz.
Compilers from 2013 include Julie Avrutine, Marie Camerota, Shelby Distenfeld, Maggie Diu, Natalie Finn, Meera Menon, Rebecca A. Morgan, Zachary Nollet, Brittany Tusa and Anu Lingala.
Compilers from 2014 include Victoria Atzl, Martina Azar, Elizabeth DuPre, Evelyn Fok, Lara Gentilini, Samantha Marfurt and Meghan McDarby.
Compilers from 2015 include Yeo Jin Ahn, Chelsea Brite, Katelyn Fletcher, Zoe Amelia Katz, Devin Massaro, Brian Meagher, and Grace Monks.
Compilers from 2016 include James Dunlea, Francis Trenel, Misha Inniss-Thompson, Azraa Janmohamed, Aaron Wei-Feng Lee, Kathleen McCormick, Taylor McGuire and Paisley Terenzi.
Compilers from 2017 include Anna Claire Fernandez, Angel Khuu, Brian LaGrant, Leona Marie Sharpstene, Sharnendra Sidhu, Hsiang Ling Tsai, Deaven Winebrake and Sohyun Lee.
Compilers from 2018 include Matthew Avila, Gregory Chen, Stacey Chen, Xi Richard Chen, Tati Guzman, Alize Hill, Anita Jegarl, Jessica Kruse, Julia Lesnick, Daniel Rosenfeld, Emily Rosenthal, Laura Sheridan, Greta Ives Sloan and Alexandria Stansell.
